topEvents.title: FDA grants breakthrough device designation to cortical BCI implant
topEvents.summary: A cortical interface program received a regulatory designation that could compress review timelines if clinical evidence remains supportive.
topEvents.investmentReadThrough: 监管节点若被确认，通常会压缩审批不确定性，并提高同路径器械公司的可比估值。

topEvents.title: Endovascular BCI study expands enrollment across additional centers
topEvents.summary: An endovascular neural interface trial added new study sites, suggesting operational progress toward a larger pivotal data package.
topEvents.investmentReadThrough: 临床进展会直接影响风险调整后 NPV，需关注样本量、终点指标和安全事件披露。

topEvents.title: High-density cortical recordings improve speech decoding performance
topEvents.summary: Recent academic work indicates that denser cortical recordings and transformer-based decoders may improve speech restoration use cases.
topEvents.investmentReadThrough: 学术突破本身不改变短期估值，但可改变中期技术路线的胜率判断。

executiveSummary.keyTakeaway: Precision Neuroscience、Synchron 相关事件主导本周信息流，重点关注监管/临床里程碑对估值重估和融资窗口的影响。
